title: PerceiveImagine
description: PerceiveImagine is an EEG dataset capturing neural activity during visual perception and imagery tasks. Participants viewed images for 6 seconds following a prompt, then closed their eyes and imagined the same images for 6 seconds. This dataset enables investigation of neural correlates underlying the transition between external visual perception and internal visual imagery.
methods_description: Participants performed alternating perception and imagery trials. Each trial consisted of a 6-second perception phase where participants viewed an image based on a prompt, followed by a 6-second imagery phase where participants imagined the previously viewed image with eyes closed. Trials were separated by auditory cues signaling task transitions.
